articles.title: Yearn Finance Mints YFI Tokens Worth $200 Million
articles.description: Yearn Finance has passed a proposal to increase the maximum supply of its YFI token, according to the project’s governance pages. Yearn Finance Breaks Its Supply Cap Yearn Finance‘s proposal to increase the maximum supply of YFI by 22% and mint 6,666 YFI has passed successfully. The vote attracted roughly 1,670 YFI in favor and 331 YFI against. The authors of the proposal chose...

articles.title: Crypto asset manager 21Shares is launching an exchange-traded product for Polkadot’s token
articles.description: Cryptocurrency asset manager 21Shares, formerly known as Amun, is launching Polkadot exchange-traded product (ETP).

articles.title: Stellar becomes new home of USDC as integration goes live
articles.description: The Stellar blockchain can be used to pay with USDC, the second-largest stablecoin.

articles.title: Yearn Finance Votes to Inflate YFI Token Supply by 20%
articles.description: The vote to mint an additional 6,666 YFI in order to fund future development on the Yearn protocol has passed.

articles.title: Ethereum Hits New All-Time High, Extending Its Stellar Rally
articles.description: Ethereum has notched another record high, soaring above $1,480

articles.title: Second-Biggest Stablecoin Goes Live on Stellar Network
articles.description: USD Coin (USDC) has been officially launched on the Stellar network

articles.title: $6 Billion Stablecoin USDC Lands On The Stellar Blockchain
articles.description: U.S. Dollar Coin (USDC), the $6 billion stablecoin developed by Circle Internet Financial on the ethereum blockchain and backed by cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase, has launched on the stellar blockchain...

Litecoin Is Getting Closer to Adding MimbleWimble's Privacy Features
articles.description: Litecoin is one step closer to implementing a version of the Harry Potter-themed privacy technology MimbleWimble.

articles.title: Crypto exchange Bibox lists new XRP perpetual with 100X leverage
articles.description: CryptoNinjas » Crypto exchange Bibox lists new XRP perpetual with 100X leverage Bibox, a popular cryptocurrency exchange, today announced that its XRP swap and USDT swap perpetual futures are now live. The newly added XRP swap and USDT swap futures support up to 100X leverage. Perpetual futures have no expiration time, so there is no restriction on the holding time. Bibox launched in...

articles.title: PrimeXBT to delist XRP trading pairs; cites ‘significant events surrounding Ripple’
articles.description: PrimeXBT is the latest crypto-exchange to delist XRP after an announcement earlier today revealed the removal of the XRP/USD, XRP/BTC trading pairs. The delisting will take effect from Wednesday, 10 February 2021, at 15:00 UTC. Prior to this, the XRP pairs will be transferred to ‘reduce only’ status on Friday, 5 February 2021, at 15:00 […]

articles.title: World’s First Polkadot ETP Launching on Swiss Exchange
articles.description: After adding Polkadot to its crypto index, 21Shares is launching an exchange-traded product (ETP) for the Web3 network’s currency. Polkadot Gets an ETP Investment product provider 21Shares is launching an ETP for the Web3 network’s DOT currency under the ticker PDOT. It will be available on the Swiss SIX exchange on Feb. 4. It’s the world’s first ETP for the growing parachain...

articles.title: Kraken CEO Jesse Powell: ‘DeFi Is Really Eating the World of Finance’
articles.description: In a recent interview with Yahoo Finance, Kraken Co-Founder and CEO Jesse Powell talked about Bitcoin, Ethereum, decentralized finance (DeFi), tokenization of stocks, and Dogecoin (DOGE). Below are a few highlights of the comments the Kraken CEO made during his discussion with Yahoo Finance’s Akiko Fujita and Zack Guzman. articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Price Analysis: Bullish Breakout Above $0.42 Likely
articles.description: ADA price formed a strong support above the $0.3000 and $0.3100 levels against the US Dollar. The price broke the $0.3900 resistance and settled above the 55 simple moving average (4-hours). articles.title: Ethereum Whale Says This New Crypto Asset Could Follow YFI’s Parabolic Rise
articles.description: An Ethereum whale who is known in the industry for his massive trove of ERC20 tokens says that a relatively unknown crypto asset could be the next yearn.finance (YFI).
